summary: P15 added command-planned network fault backends with explicit unsupported Darwin behavior and Linux tc/netem migration tests covering client and cluster bus ports.
expected_outputs: LinuxNetemBackend command construction boundaries for tc/netem and firewall selectors
Darwin capability detection returning capability-limited result
Targets include cluster bus ports, not only client ports

verified_outputs.output: LinuxNetemBackend command construction boundaries for tc/netem and firewall selectors
Darwin capability detection returning capability-limited result
Targets include cluster bus ports, not only client ports

commands.command: python3 -m py_compile harness/network_faults.py nodehost/faults_network.py harness/platform_adapter.py harness/platform_darwin.py harness/platform_linux.py

risks: Real tc/netem and firewall commands were NOT_VALIDATED in P15.
Darwin precise network fault injection remains SKIPPED_RESOURCE until a supported backend is proven.
